query:
ALTER TABLE users
ADD COLUMN avatarUrl VARCHAR(500),
ADD COLUMN aliases TEXT,
ADD COLUMN teacherAttribute ENUM('S', 'M', 'Switch'),
ADD COLUMN customerType VARCHAR(200),
ADD COLUMN category VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN hourlyRate DECIMAL(10, 2),
ADD COLUMN bankAccount VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN bankName VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN contractEndDate DATE,
ADD COLUMN joinDate DATE,
ADD COLUMN teacherStatus VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '活跃',
ADD COLUMN teacherNotes TEXT,
ADD COLUMN wechat VARCHAR(100);
